title: 1. The Lost Bazaar
description: Find the peaceful plains village of the Golden Bazaar to the East and locate the Villager.
objective_text: Talk to the Villager in the plains bazaar

title: 2. Shelter Building
description: To survive the night, gather Leaves from the forest trees to build a thatch roof.

title: 3. Fuel the Fryer
description: The Merchant needs geothermal fuel to fry his crispy therapeutic chickens.
objective_text: Trade 1x Lava Bucket with the Merchant (Slot 6)

title: 4. Plains Defender
description: Protect the bazaar! Equip your Wooden Sword (Slot 8) and eliminate a night Zombie.

title: 5. Miner's Descent
description: Deepen your mining skills. Find stone mountains or dig down to accumulate raw cobble.

title: 6. The Lost Lantern
description: Explore the North-West Craggy Peaks and stand near the wooden Mine Support Pillar and its lantern.

title: 7. The Frozen Spire
description: Embark on an expedition to the far North Polar Glaciers and locate the majestic Frozen Ice Spire.
objective_text: Explore the Frostbite Glaciers Ice Spire

title: 8. Polar Forager
description: The freezing cold requires calories. Hunt polar fauna or zombies to stockpile survival rations.

title: 9. Whispering Redwood
description: Trek West into the Redwood Forest and climb to the top canopy of a coniferous redwood giant.
objective_text: Scale a Giant Redwood Tree canopy

title: 10. The Obsidian Pyramid
description: Travel North-East into the Neon Ruins crater and stand near the ancient glowing Neon Pyramid.

title: 11. Lava-Fried Feast
description: Stockpile deep-fried rations before preparing your final building ascent.

title: 12. The Cloud Ascent
description: Build a dirt pillar or scale a mountain to ascend above height Y=18 and reach the Cloud Kingdom.
objective_text: Build or climb to the sky Cloud Kingdom (Height Y >= 18)
